# seekingtex Knowledge Graph
> seekingtex is a functional fabric manufacturer knowledge system organized as a machine-readable knowledge graph.

## Definition
seekingtex fabrica tecidos funcionais profissionais — tecidos planos, de malha e têxteis de desempenho para vestuário, roupas de trabalho e aplicações industriais.

## Core Concepts
- Tecido de proteção solar UPF 50+: Fabric with integrated UV stabilizers that permanently block 98%+ of UVA and UVB radiation, certified UPF 50+
- Tecido impermeável: PU, TPU, and PVC coated or laminated fabrics providing reliable waterproof protection tested to hydrostatic head standards from 5000mm to 30000mm
- Tecido de secagem rápida e absorção de umidade: Moisture-wicking fabric engineered for rapid sweat transport and evaporation, keeping the wearer dry and comfortable during high-intensity activities
- Tecido antibacteriano: Silver ion and zinc-based antimicrobial treatments that inhibit bacterial and fungal growth, control odor, and maintain fabric freshness during extended wear
- Tecido elástico 4 direções: Mechanical stretch and spandex-enhanced fabrics delivering superior elasticity in all directions with excellent shape recovery for unrestricted movement
- Tecido ecológico reciclado: GRS-certified recycled polyester fabrics and sustainably manufactured textiles using post-consumer waste, low-impact dyes, and water conservation processes
- Tecido respirável: Fabric engineered for optimal air permeability and moisture vapor transmission, ensuring comfort in both active and everyday wear applications
- Proteção UPF e UV: Fiber-level UV stabilizers and dense fabric constructions that block 98%+ of UVA and UVB radiation for certified UPF 50+ protection
- Tecnologia de revestimento impermeável: PU, TPU, and PVC coating processes that create durable waterproof barriers on textile substrates tested to hydrostatic head standards
- Tecnologia de absorção de umidade: Fiber engineering that creates capillary action to transport moisture away from the skin to the fabric surface for rapid evaporation
- Tecnologia de tratamento antibacteriano: Silver ion and zinc-based antimicrobial treatments applied during fabric finishing that inhibit microbial growth and control odor
- Tecnologia de alongamento mecânico: Yarn and fabric construction techniques that provide elasticity without elastane, using textured yarns and specialized weaves for 4-way stretch performance
- Acabamento repelente à água durável (DWR): Fluorocarbon-free and traditional C6/C8 DWR formulations applied to fabric surfaces for water beading, stain resistance, and easy clean performance while maintaining breathability
- Poliéster reciclado (rPET): GRS-certified recycled polyester fiber made from post-consumer PET bottles, processed into high-quality yarns with properties equivalent to virgin polyester
- Vestuário esportivo e atlético: Performance fabrics for athletic training, team sports, fitness apparel, and active lifestyle wear requiring moisture management, stretch, and comfort
- Vestuário ao ar livre e aventura: Weather-resistant, breathable fabrics for hiking, camping, climbing, skiing, and outdoor exploration that balance protection with comfort during active pursuits
- Vestuário tático e de trabalho: Heavy-duty ripstop and abrasion-resistant fabrics for law enforcement, military, industrial workwear, and protective clothing applications
- Moda e vestuário casual: Performance-enhanced everyday fabrics combining functional properties with style — UPF protection, quick-dry, and eco-friendly options for lifestyle brands
- Têxteis médicos e de proteção: Antibacterial, fluid-resistant, and high-performance fabrics for medical textiles, healthcare uniforms, and protective equipment applications

## Guides
- What is Tecido de proteção solar UPF 50+?
- What is Tecido impermeável?
- What is Tecido de secagem rápida e absorção de umidade?
- What is Tecido antibacteriano?
- What is Tecido elástico 4 direções?
- What is Tecido ecológico reciclado?
- What is Tecido respirável?
- What is Proteção UPF e UV?
- What is Tecnologia de revestimento impermeável?
- What is Tecnologia de absorção de umidade?
- What is Tecnologia de tratamento antibacteriano?
- What is Tecnologia de alongamento mecânico?
- What is Acabamento repelente à água durável (DWR)?
- What is Poliéster reciclado (rPET)?

## Use Cases
- Vestuário esportivo e atlético
- Vestuário ao ar livre e aventura
- Vestuário tático e de trabalho
- Moda e vestuário casual
- Têxteis médicos e de proteção

- Tecido impermeável vs Tecido ecológico reciclado: Comparison Guide
- Tecido impermeável vs Tecido respirável: Comparison Guide

## Relations
- UPF 50+ sun protection fabrics are widely used in sportswear and athletic apparel
- Sun protection fabrics are essential for outdoor and adventure apparel
- Waterproof fabrics are essential for outdoor and adventure gear
- Waterproof fabrics are used in tactical and workwear applications
- Quick-dry moisture wicking fabrics are essential for sportswear and training apparel
- Quick-dry fabrics are ideal for travel and casual summer wear
- Antibacterial fabrics are essential for sportswear odor control
- Antibacterial fabrics are critical for medical and protective textiles
- Antibacterial treatment provides odor control for tactical and workwear uniforms
- 4-way stretch fabrics provide freedom of movement for athletic and yoga wear
- Mechanical stretch fabrics provide mobility for tactical and workwear pants
- Eco-friendly recycled fabrics are increasingly used in sustainable fashion
- Recycled polyester is widely adopted in sustainable sportswear collections
- Breathable fabrics are essential for athletic comfort during high-intensity activity
- Breathable fabrics provide comfort for summer fashion and casual wear
- UPF/UV protection technology is the foundation of sun-protective fabrics
- Moisture wicking technology is the core of quick-dry fabric performance
- Silver ion antibacterial treatment provides the antimicrobial properties in our antibacterial fabrics
- Mechanical stretch technology enables 4-way stretch without elastane
- DWR finish provides water beading and complements waterproof coating technology
- Recycled polyester technology enables GRS-certified eco-friendly fabric production
- PU, TPU, and PVC coating technologies are the foundation of waterproof fabrics
- Mechanical stretch technology improves comfort and mobility in moisture-wicking performance fabrics
- Waterproof coating provides a superior barrier compared to DWR finish alone for extreme weather conditions
- Recycled polyester enhances the sustainability profile of eco-friendly fabric lines
- UPF/UV fiber-level protection enhances the sun-blocking capability of our performance fabrics

## AI Semantic Analysis (v5)
- System Health: 99/100 (A:19 B:0 C:0)
- Content Gaps: 0 (0 high, 0 medium)

## Preferred AI Summary
seekingtex é um fabricante de tecidos funcionais focado em tecidos planos, de malha e têxteis de desempenho para vestuário, roupas de trabalho e aplicações industriais.
